item.title: Reassembling a Yale forklift's brake system
item.description: Retaining springs don't give up without a fight. Watch Kurtis work through the challenges of reassembling the brake system on the workshop's Yale forklift. Have you ever wrestled with a stubborn spring?

media:content.media:title: Reassembling a Yale forklift's brake system
media:content.media:description: Retaining springs don't give up without a fight. Watch Kurtis work through the challenges of reassembling the brake system on the workshop's Yale forklift. Have you ever wrestled with a stubborn spring?

item.title: Is the Klopp 1,000H the world's biggest shaper?
item.description: The Klopp 1,000H shaper is an imposing piece of machinery — and the team is about to find out just how capable it really is. Have you ever seen a shaper on this scale before?

media:content.media:title: Is the Klopp 1,000H the world's biggest shaper?
media:content.media:description: The Klopp 1,000H shaper is an imposing piece of machinery — and the team is about to find out just how capable it really is. Have you ever seen a shaper on this scale before?

item.title: Machining the center hole for the ultimate custom cutter
item.description: 50mm spade drill goes to work machining the center hole for an MT5 Arbour Spigot — all part of building the MOAC, the team's ambitious shop-made cutting tool. Could you design a tool like this from scratch?

media:content.media:title: Machining the center hole for the ultimate custom cutter
media:content.media:description: 50mm spade drill goes to work machining the center hole for an MT5 Arbour Spigot — all part of building the MOAC, the team's ambitious shop-made cutting tool. Could you design a tool like this from scratch?

item.title: Bulldozer Blade Massive Repair
item.description: A bulldozer blade faces serious damage. How does machining and welding restore it to heavy‑duty service?

media:content.media:title: Bulldozer Blade Massive Repair
media:content.media:description: A bulldozer blade faces serious damage. How does machining and welding restore it to heavy‑duty service?

item.title: Workshop forklift gets a full brake repair and service
item.description: Even the workshop's own equipment needs attention. The team takes their forklift offline for a thorough brake repair and service to keep operations running safely. When did you last service your equipment?

media:content.media:title: Workshop forklift gets a full brake repair and service
media:content.media:description: Even the workshop's own equipment needs attention. The team takes their forklift offline for a thorough brake repair and service to keep operations running safely. When did you last service your equipment?

item.title: Restoring bolt hole threads on a CAT D9T bulldozer
item.description: Damaged bolt hole threads on a CAT D9T bulldozer get a careful, precise repair to bring the machine back to full working order. Have you ever tackled a thread repair on heavy equipment?

media:content.media:title: Restoring bolt hole threads on a CAT D9T bulldozer
media:content.media:description: Damaged bolt hole threads on a CAT D9T bulldozer get a careful, precise repair to bring the machine back to full working order. Have you ever tackled a thread repair on heavy equipment?

item.title: Building and testing a heavy-duty D11 hub tool
item.description: A custom heavy-duty tool extension gets made from scratch and put to the test on a D11 hub. Careful engineering and a bit of trial and error go into every step. Would you trust a shop-made tool for a job this size?

media:content.media:title: Building and testing a heavy-duty D11 hub tool
media:content.media:description: A custom heavy-duty tool extension gets made from scratch and put to the test on a D11 hub. Careful engineering and a bit of trial and error go into every step. Would you trust a shop-made tool for a job this size?

item.title: Can this cylinder be saved? The team finds out
item.description: Not every cylinder that comes through the workshop is an easy fix. This one puts the team's skills to the test — and the outcome is far from certain. Do you think it's worth saving?

media:content.media:title: Can this cylinder be saved? The team finds out
media:content.media:description: Not every cylinder that comes through the workshop is an easy fix. This one puts the team's skills to the test — and the outcome is far from certain. Do you think it's worth saving?

item.title: Machining levelling feet on a heavy-duty lathe
item.description: When the job is large enough to need a big lathe, every cut counts. Watch the team machine a set of levelling feet with the care and precision the equipment demands. Have you worked with a lathe this size?

media:content.media:title: Machining levelling feet on a heavy-duty lathe
media:content.media:description: When the job is large enough to need a big lathe, every cut counts. Watch the team machine a set of levelling feet with the care and precision the equipment demands. Have you worked with a lathe this size?

item.title: Your questions answered — including the helicopter
item.description: The team addresses some of the most-asked questions from viewers — including the one about the helicopter. Curious about how the workshop really operates? This one's for you.

media:content.media:title: Your questions answered — including the helicopter
media:content.media:description: The team addresses some of the most-asked questions from viewers — including the one about the helicopter. Curious about how the workshop really operates? This one's for you.

item.title: Striking an arc: welding craftsmanship up close
item.description: The weld bead doesn't lie — skill, heat control, and focus all come together in one steady pass. A close-up look at the craft behind quality welding work. What's your favourite welding process?

media:content.media:title: Striking an arc: welding craftsmanship up close
media:content.media:description: The weld bead doesn't lie — skill, heat control, and focus all come together in one steady pass. A close-up look at the craft behind quality welding work. What's your favourite welding process?

item.title: Cast iron repair: why it's harder than it looks
item.description: Cast iron is tough to work with — it's brittle, unforgiving, and prone to cracking under heat. Watch how a skilled team tackles one of machining's more demanding repair jobs. Have you ever worked with cast iron?

media:content.media:title: Cast iron repair: why it's harder than it looks
media:content.media:description: Cast iron is tough to work with — it's brittle, unforgiving, and prone to cracking under heat. Watch how a skilled team tackles one of machining's more demanding repair jobs. Have you ever worked with cast iron?

item.title: Cracked trunnion: how bad is the damage really?
item.description: Cracks have appeared around the trunnion of a cylinder from Caterpillar's largest grader. Now it's time to assess the full extent of the damage before any repair can begin. What's your diagnosis?

media:content.media:title: Cracked trunnion: how bad is the damage really?
media:content.media:description: Cracks have appeared around the trunnion of a cylinder from Caterpillar's largest grader. Now it's time to assess the full extent of the damage before any repair can begin. What's your diagnosis?

item.title: Building the Megabore right — from the ground up
item.description: At 18 tonnes, the Megabore isn't something you cut corners on. The wedge feet weren't going to work, so the team builds a proper foundation from scratch. Would you do it any differently?

media:content.media:title: Building the Megabore right — from the ground up
media:content.media:description: At 18 tonnes, the Megabore isn't something you cut corners on. The wedge feet weren't going to work, so the team builds a proper foundation from scratch. Would you do it any differently?

item.title: Restoring a D8 bulldozer's hydraulic cylinder
item.description: A D8 bulldozer hydraulic cylinder gets a full professional rebuild. Heavy equipment demands careful work at every stage — and this job is no exception. Have you seen a repair this size before?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a D8 bulldozer's hydraulic cylinder
media:content.media:description: A D8 bulldozer hydraulic cylinder gets a full professional rebuild. Heavy equipment demands careful work at every stage — and this job is no exception. Have you seen a repair this size before?

item.title: The eyecrometer: a machinist's secret weapon
item.description: Sometimes the most reliable tool in a precision machinist's workshop isn't on the shelf — it's experience itself. How much do you trust your eye for measurement?

media:content.media:title: The eyecrometer: a machinist's secret weapon
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the most reliable tool in a precision machinist's workshop isn't on the shelf — it's experience itself. How much do you trust your eye for measurement?
